title: Support - App, user not logged ever, dialog
scenario: Guest user in Poly Studio Mobile app sees login prompt when tapping App button in Support via hamburger menu
steps: 1. Install the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Open the hamburger menu (three-line icon in the top-left corner).
5. Tap the "App" button on the Support screen.
expected: A dialog is displayed prompting the user to log in with their Poly Lens account. The dialog includes "Later" and "Login" buttons.
